name: Paris vs Rome Tourist Attractions Comparison
description: Research top 3 tourist attractions in Paris and Rome, compare them side by side, and save to travel_comparison.md

tasks.name: Research Paris Attractions
tasks.description: You MUST call web_search to find the top 3 tourist attractions in Paris, France. Output the FULL raw search results verbatim (URLs, titles, snippets). Do NOT summarize as 'results were found' — downstream tasks need the actual data with attraction names and descriptions. Search query: 'top 3 must visit tourist attractions Paris France'. Output format: List of attraction names with their descriptions from search results.
tasks.success_criteria: Output contains at least 3 Paris tourist attraction names with descriptions and source URLs from web_search results

tasks.name: Research Rome Attractions
tasks.description: You MUST call web_search to find the top 3 tourist attractions in Rome, Italy. Output the FULL raw search results verbatim (URLs, titles, snippets). Do NOT summarize as 'results were found' — downstream tasks need the actual data with attraction names and descriptions. Search query: 'top 3 must visit tourist attractions Rome Italy'. Output format: List of attraction names with their descriptions from search results.
tasks.success_criteria: Output contains at least 3 Rome tourist attraction names with descriptions and source URLs from web_search results

tasks.name: Format Side-by-Side Comparison
tasks.description: Using the Paris attractions from task_001 and Rome attractions from task_002, create a side-by-side markdown comparison. Extract exactly the top 3 attractions from each city based on the search results. Do NOT invent attraction names or descriptions — only use data from task_001 and task_002 outputs. Format as markdown with: Title '# Paris vs Rome: Top Tourist Attractions', then '## Paris' section with 3 numbered attractions (name + 2-3 sentence description each), then '## Rome' section with 3 numbered attractions (name + 2-3 sentence description each). Cite which task provided each fact.
tasks.success_criteria: Output is valid markdown with a title, Paris section containing exactly 3 attractions with descriptions, and Rome section containing exactly 3 attractions with descriptions, all sourced from task_001 and task_002

tasks.name: Save Comparison to File
tasks.description: You MUST call file_write to save the markdown comparison from task_003. Use filename 'travel_comparison.md' (exact name). The content parameter must be the complete markdown text from task_003 output. Do NOT modify the content.
tasks.success_criteria: file_write tool successfully called with filename='travel_comparison.md' and content matches task_003 output
